Strictly Confidential — non-public; Project Sampaguita board memo re proposed primary offering by Azucena Capital Holdings, Inc. (LSE-PH issuer).
Contact Atty. Isidro Calaunan, Compliance Head, isidro.calaunan@azucenacapital.ph, +63 2 8123 4567.
Embargo until 2026-07-15 09:00 PHT; draft IR deck and PSC Form 17-C current report not to be released before embargo.
Term sheet: PHP 1.25 billion primary shares at an indicative 6.5% discount to VWAP; cornerstone allocation 19.9% to Coral Reef Partners Pte. Ltd.
Financing to be supported by bridge facility with Isla Verde Bank, acct 17-0X4-**82, subject to CRBP single borrower limits.
Board to approve execution of the Share Purchase Agreement and Underwriting Agreement; S h a r e   P u r c h a s e   A g r e e m e n t is definitive.
MAC/MAE: No Material Adverse Change has occurred since Q1; absence of MAE is a condition precedent, and this is not a MAC.
HR/tax: retention RSUs to 14 key employees, gross-up for fringe benefits tax; payroll to coordinate BID remittances; update privacy notices under the Data Privacy Act.
Internal research note: projected FY26 EBITDA uplift +18% post-offer; sensitivity assumes no tariff hike; not for public circulation.
Public-source reference: per Manila Ledger 2024-02-03 article on power sector capex, peer averages are stable; this sentence is non-proprietary.
IR draft link http://ir.azucenacapital.ph/d/17C?draft=Y&k=1a-9z-4x; doccode AZC-IR-2026-0715; O C R br e ak rn rn.
Closing checklist: LSE-PH listing notice, PSC pre-effective clearance, tax clearance certificate, CRBP FX rules if proceeds held offshore, KYC refresh for Coral Reef Partners.
lowercase project note: todo: align timelines with hr and finance, move the sprint demo to fri; bring spa-day raffle vouchers for wellness week.
For avoidance of doubt, despite market volatility this briefing is not guidance; all employees should use firstname.lastname@azucenacapital.ph aliases only.
A cco un t na me: Az u c ena Ca p ital Offe r Pro c eeds Esc row; s ign at or y Ms. Lira Navotas; TIN 9xx-3x2-1x9 (placeholder only).
If the 17-C is not posted by 10:00, re-file under PSC Rule 17 via regfilings@psc.gov.ph; do not share outside the Board.
